prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, Mira Ledgerfall, an androgynous senior cadre in a navy cloak with gold trim and silver hair, stands beside Ari Ironleaf, an androgynous ranger in a green half-cape. They are huddled over a large wooden strategy map on a central table. Mira gently attempts to nudge a stubborn, fluffy messenger bird off the map using the tip of a quill, while Ari watches intently, reaching out a hand with a small piece of dried fruit to lure the bird away. High-quality anime aesthetic, warm ambient lighting, cinematic focus on cooperative problem-solving, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild hall shot; the messenger bird hops onto Ari's outstretched hand to accept the dried fruit. Mira smiles and uses the opening to quickly smooth out the map where the bird was standing. Ari carefully lifts the bird away from the table while Mira secures the map edges with her free hand. Consistent character designs, fluid cooperative motion, warm lighting, no text, no watermark.
